template.name: Real-Time Webhook Data Processing Pipeline
template.description: High-performance webhook data processing template with automatic payload parsing, validation, transformation, and intelligent routing. Handles high-volume webhook traffic with retry mechanisms and dead letter queues.

routing_rules.description: High priority events for immediate processing

indexes: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_webhook_events_timestamp ON webhook_events(event_timestamp)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_webhook_events_type ON webhook_events(event_type)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_webhook_events_priority ON webhook_events(priority_level)

alerts.message: High validation error rate in webhook processing

high_priority_threshold.description: Priority score threshold for high priority processing

enable_dead_letter_queue.description: Enable dead letter queue for failed events

documentation.setup_guide:
1. Configure webhook endpoint and authentication
2. Set up database connections for event storage
3. Configure Redis for caching and Kafka for streaming
4. Define validation rules and processing routes
5. Set up notification channels for alerts
6. Test with sample webhook payloads
7. Monitor performance and adjust thresholds
use_cases: User activity event streaming from mobile apps
System monitoring and alerting via webhooks

troubleshooting.high_latency: Check database connection pool and optimize queries
troubleshooting.validation_failures: Review validation rules and payload structure
troubleshooting.missing_events: Check dead letter queue and webhook authentication
troubleshooting.cache_issues: Monitor Redis memory usage and connection stability
